technology.title: The Silicon Valley congressional race is getting ugly
technology.summary: The primary isn’t until early June, but the CA-17 race between five-term incumbent Ro Khanna and tech founder Ethan Agarwal is already getting nasty. Agarwal entered the race in March, backed by a roster of prominent tech billionaires largely in response to Khanna’s public support for a proposed California ballot measure that would impose a […]

briefing.news_focus: The primary isn’t until early June, but the CA-17 race between five-term incumbent Ro Khanna and tech founder Ethan Agarwal is already getting nasty. Agarwal entered the race in March, backed by a roster of prominent tech billionaires largely in response to Khanna’s public support for a proposed California ballot measure that would impose a […]
briefing.news_focus_zh: 加州第17選區的國會選舉競爭日益激烈，現任議員Ro Khanna與科技創始人Ethan Agarwal之間的對抗已經開始升溫。Agarwal在三月參選，並獲得多位科技億萬富翁的支持，這主要是因為Khanna對一項提案的公開支持。
briefing.background: 加州第17選區長期以來是科技業影響力的中心，Ro Khanna作為現任議員，致力於推動科技相關政策。然而，隨著Ethan Agarwal的參選，競選的焦點轉向了Khanna對一項可能影響科技產業的公投提案的支持。這一提案旨在對科技公司施加更多監管，反映出科技界對政策變化的敏感性及其對選舉的影響。
briefing.analysis: Agarwal的參選受到多位科技億萬富翁的支持，顯示出科技界對Khanna政策的不滿，尤其是對於可能增加監管的提案。Khanna則可能面臨來自選民的壓力，因為他必須平衡科技公司的利益與選民對於監管的需求。這場選舉不僅是個人之間的對抗，更是科技界與政策制定者之間的權力角逐，未來可能影響加州的科技政策走向。

supporting_titles: The Gulf was Silicon Valley’s bet on the future. Trump has put it in the crosshairs
‘Guns, Beer, Titties, Freedom’: Inside the World’s Toughest Off-Road Race

technology.title: Popular AI gateway startup LiteLLM ditches controversial startup Delve
technology.summary: LiteLLM had obtained two security compliance certifications via Delve and fell victim to some horrific credential-stealing malware last week.

briefing.news_focus: LiteLLM had obtained two security compliance certifications via Delve and fell victim to some horrific credential-stealing malware last week.
briefing.news_focus_zh: LiteLLM這家受歡迎的AI網關創業公司決定終止與爭議性創業公司Delve的合作，此舉是在LiteLLM遭遇嚴重的憑證竊取惡意軟體攻擊後做出的決定。
briefing.background: LiteLLM專注於提供AI解決方案，並在安全合規性方面取得了進展，透過Delve獲得了兩項安全認證。然而，Delve因其過去的爭議而受到關注，這可能影響了LiteLLM的品牌形象。隨著網路安全威脅的增加，企業對於合作夥伴的選擇愈加謹慎，特別是在數據安全和合規性方面。
briefing.analysis: LiteLLM終止與Delve的合作，顯示出對品牌形象和客戶信任的重視。此舉可能會使LiteLLM在短期內面臨合規性挑戰，但長期而言，這有助於重建市場信任。Delve則可能因失去合作夥伴而面臨業務壓力，並需重新評估其市場定位。這一事件突顯了在科技行業中，企業間的合作關係如何受到安全事件的影響。

technology.title: DOJ confirms FBI Director Kash Patel’s personal email was hacked
technology.summary: Hackers claimed the attack was retaliation after Patel vowed to "hunt" them.

briefing.news_focus: Hackers claimed the attack was retaliation after Patel vowed to "hunt" them.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國司法部確認FBI局長Kash Patel的個人電子郵件遭到駭客攻擊，駭客聲稱此行動是對Patel威脅要追捕他們的報復。
briefing.background: Kash Patel於2020年被任命為FBI局長，並在任內強調打擊網路犯罪的重要性。隨著網路攻擊事件頻繁，政府機構對於網路安全的重視程度日益提高。此次事件反映了駭客與政府官員之間的對抗，並可能影響FBI在網路安全領域的公信力與執法能力。
briefing.analysis: 此次駭客攻擊的背後，反映出網路犯罪分子對政府官員的挑釁與反擊。對於FBI而言，這不僅是一次安全漏洞的展示，更可能影響其在公眾中的形象及執法信任度。駭客的行為可能激化政府對網路安全的投入，然而也可能引發更嚴厲的監控與反制措施，進一步影響網路自由。

supporting_titles: Iranian Hackers Breached Kash Patel’s Email—but Not the FBI’s

politics.title: Middle East crisis live: Iran attacks tanker in Dubai; explosions in Tehran and Jerusalem amid wave of strikes
politics.summary: Fully loaded Kuwaiti tanker set alight as attacks continue despite Trump’s warning he would obliterate Iran’s energy facilities if the strait of Hormuz was not reopened Kuwaiti tanker hit by Iranian attack in Dubai port, raising oil spill fears Trump threatens to ‘obliterate’ Iran’s energy grid if ceasefire not reached ‘shortly’ Saudi Arabia’s defence ministry has said it has intercepted and destroyed ten drones over the past hours, and eight missiles launched towards the Riyadh area and the country’s eastern region. Early this morning Kuwait said its air defences were responding to hostile missile and drone attacks. Neither Saudi Arabia nor Kuwait said where the drones or missiles came from. Iran attacked and set ablaze a fully loaded crude oil tanker off Dubai. Local authorities later said response teams contained the incident with no oil leakage and that no injuries had been reported Donald Trump warned that the US would obliterate Iran’s energy plants and oil wells if it did not open the strait of Hormuz. The Israeli military said four soldiers had been killed in combat in southern Lebanon, where its forces are clashing with Iran-backed Hezbollah. Two giant Chinese container ships have sailed through the strait of Hormuz on their second attempt to leave the Gulf after turning back on Friday , ship-tracking data shows. The transit signals a diplomatic breakthrough between Beijing and Tehran as Iran widens its list of approved nations for transiting the vital route, Lloyd’s List reported. Indonesia’s foreign minister called for an emergency UN security council meeting and a thorough investigation” into a “heinous attack” after three UN peacekeepers from Indonesia were killed in southern Lebanon. Blasts were heard in Tehran and power cuts hit some areas of the capital, Iranian media reported on Tuesday. Israel earlier carried out missile strikes on what it called military infrastructure in Tehran and infrastructure used by Hezbollah in Beirut. Japan and Indonesia agreed to step up coordination on energy security , Japanese PM Sanae Takaichi said on Tuesday. Two Iranian missile launches targeted central Israel, Israeli media reported, with the emergency service saying it had not received reports of any injuries. Turkey reported a ballistic missile launched from Iran had entered Turkish airspace before being shot down by Nato air and missile defences. An earlier summary of key developments is here . Continue reading...

Early this morning Kuwait said its air defences were responding to hostile missile and drone attacks. Neither Saudi Arabia nor Kuwait said where the drones or missiles came from. Iran attacked and set ablaze a fully loaded crude oil tanker off Dubai. The Israeli military said four soldiers had been killed in combat in southern Lebanon, where its forces are clashing with Iran-backed Hezbollah. Two giant Chinese container ships have sailed through the strait of Hormuz on their second attempt to leave the Gulf after turning back on Friday , ship-tracking data shows. Indonesia’s foreign minister called for an emergency UN security council meeting and a thorough investigation” into a “heinous attack” after three UN peacekeepers from Indonesia were killed in southern Lebanon. Blasts were heard in Tehran and power cuts hit some areas of the capital, Iranian media reported on Tuesday. Israel earlier carried out missile strikes on what it called military infrastructure in Tehran and infrastructure used by Hezbollah in Beirut. Two Iranian missile launches targeted central Israel, Israeli media reported, with the emergency service saying it had not received reports of any injuries. Turkey reported a ballistic missile launched from Iran had entered Turkish airspace before being shot down by Nato air and missile defences. An earlier summary of key developments is here . Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗在杜拜襲擊一艘滿載的科威特油輪，隨後在德黑蘭和耶路撒冷發生爆炸事件，顯示中東局勢持續緊張。特朗普警告若霍爾木茲海峽不重新開放，將摧毀伊朗的能源設施。沙烏地阿拉伯和科威特的防空系統也攔截了多架無人機和導彈。
briefing.background: 中東地區的緊張局勢源於多方利益的交錯，特別是美國、伊朗及其盟友間的對抗。霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，任何衝突都可能影響全球能源市場。特朗普政府對伊朗的強硬立場加劇了地區緊張，而伊朗則透過軍事行動回應外部壓力，進一步複雜化局勢。
briefing.analysis: 此次襲擊反映了伊朗與沙烏地阿拉伯及以色列之間的持續敵對關係。特朗普的威脅可能會促使伊朗採取更激烈的反擊行動，進一步升高衝突風險。沙烏地阿拉伯和科威特的防空反應顯示出對伊朗攻擊的高度警覺，然而，這也可能導致更大範圍的軍事對抗。中國的介入可能會改變地區力量平衡，促進外交解決方案的出現。

politics.title: In age of US-China rivalry, supply chain statecraft counts
politics.summary: Geopolitical competition has long been understood in territorial terms. Power was measured by control over land, resources and populations. Rivalry was expressed through military confrontation, alliance formation and the defence of borders. As economic interdependence deepened in the 20th century, globalisation was seen as an arena within which states competed, but not itself the object of competition. That assumption no longer holds. Increasingly, the infrastructure of globalisation is becoming...

briefing.news_focus: Geopolitical competition has long been understood in territorial terms. Power was measured by control over land, resources and populations. Rivalry was expressed through military confrontation, alliance formation and the defence of borders. As economic interdependence deepened in the 20th century, globalisation was seen as an arena within which states competed, but not itself the object of competition. That assumption no longer holds. Increasingly, the infrastructure of globalisation is becoming...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 在美中競爭的背景下，供應鏈的戰略運用成為新的地緣政治工具，顯示出全球化基礎設施的競爭性質日益明顯。
briefing.background: 隨著20世紀經濟相互依賴的加深，全球化不再僅是國家間的競爭舞台，而是成為競爭的核心。供應鏈的控制與運用，尤其在美中兩國的科技與經濟競爭中，成為影響國際關係的重要因素。各國在尋求經濟利益的同時，也必須考量其供應鏈的安全性與穩定性，這使得供應鏈的戰略性運用成為國家政策的重要組成部分。
briefing.analysis: 美國與中國在供應鏈上的競爭，反映出兩國在經濟與科技領域的深層次矛盾。美國試圖透過限制中國高科技產品的供應鏈來維護其全球領導地位，而中國則致力於提升自身的供應鏈自主性，減少對外依賴。這種競爭不僅影響兩國的經濟政策，也可能引發全球供應鏈的重組，影響其他國家的經濟利益與政策選擇。

politics.title: US may reassess Nato ties after Iran war ends, Rubio says
politics.summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the US may need to reassess its relationship with Nato after the Iran war is finished, calling the military alliance’s alleged lack of support during the Middle East conflict “very disappointing”. Rubio assailed Nato members for denying access to military bases, following prior criticism from US President Donald Trump that partners in the security bloc are “cowards” and that the alliance is a “paper tiger”. “The president and our country will have to...

briefing.news_focus: Secretary of State Marco Rubio said the US may need to reassess its relationship with Nato after the Iran war is finished, calling the military alliance’s alleged lack of support during the Middle East conflict “very disappointing”. Rubio assailed Nato members for denying access to military bases, following prior criticism from US President Donald Trump that partners in the security bloc are “cowards” and that the alliance is a “paper tiger”. “The president and our country will have to...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國國務卿馬可·魯比奧表示，伊朗戰爭結束後，美國可能需要重新評估與北約的關係，因為他對北約在中東衝突期間的支持表示失望，並批評成員國拒絕提供軍事基地使用權。
briefing.background: 北約自1949年成立以來，一直是美國在歐洲的主要安全夥伴。然而，近年來，隨著地緣政治的變化，特別是美國對中東政策的調整，北約的角色受到質疑。特朗普政府期間，對北約的批評聲音增強，認為盟友未能承擔足夠的軍事負擔。魯比奧的言論反映出美國對北約的期待與現實之間的落差，尤其是在面對伊朗等地區威脅時。
briefing.analysis: 魯比奧的評論顯示出美國內部對北約的分歧，特別是在軍事支援和資源共享方面。美國希望北約成員國能夠在中東衝突中提供更多支持，但許多成員國對於參與此類衝突持保留態度，擔心可能的後果。這可能導致美國與北約的關係緊張，並促使美國重新考量其在全球安全架構中的角色。若美國決定減少對北約的依賴，可能會影響到歐洲的安全局勢及美國的全球影響力。

economy.title: Fed's Williams says monetary policy well positioned for unusual circumstances - Reuters
economy.summary: Fed's Williams says monetary policy well positioned for unusual circumstances Reuters

briefing.news_focus: Fed's Williams says monetary policy well positioned for unusual circumstances Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國聯邦儲備銀行的威廉姆斯表示，當前的貨幣政策已經為不尋常的經濟環境做好了準備，顯示出對未來經濟挑戰的信心。
briefing.background: 美國聯邦儲備銀行在應對通脹和經濟增長放緩的背景下，已經採取了多項貨幣政策措施，包括加息和資產購買計畫的調整。隨著全球經濟的不確定性增加，特別是受到地緣政治緊張和供應鏈問題的影響，聯儲的政策靈活性變得尤為重要。威廉姆斯的言論反映了聯儲對於維持經濟穩定的承諾。
briefing.analysis: 威廉姆斯的表態旨在安撫市場對於未來經濟波動的擔憂，顯示出聯儲在應對不尋常經濟情況下的靈活性。然而，市場對於聯儲未來政策走向的解讀可能會有所不同，部分投資者可能擔心過度的貨幣寬鬆會導致通脹持續上升，而另一些則可能認為這是支持經濟增長的必要措施。這種分歧可能會影響資本市場的走勢。

economy.title: Food price rises unlikely before summer, says boss of Sainsbury’s
economy.summary: Simon Roberts says Easter shop will be unaffected by Middle East conflict, but industry warns prices may rise this year Shoppers will not see food prices rise until at least the summer and Easter will be unaffected by conflict in the Middle East, the boss of Sainsbury’s has said, despite fears of an inflation spike. Simon Roberts said it was “too early” to say whether and when food price inflation related to higher commodity costs would hit supermarket shelves and that the UK’s second-largest supermarket had long-term agreements with suppliers to help protect shoppers. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Simon Roberts says Easter shop will be unaffected by Middle East conflict, but industry warns prices may rise this year Shoppers will not see food prices rise until at least the summer and Easter will be unaffected by conflict in the Middle East, the boss of Sainsbury’s has said, despite fears of an inflation spike. Simon Roberts said it was “too early” to say whether and when food price inflation related to higher commodity costs would hit supermarket shelves and that the UK’s second-largest supermarket had long-term agreements with suppliers to help protect shoppers. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Sainsbury's CEO Simon Roberts表示，儘管面臨中東衝突的影響，食品價格在夏季之前不會上漲，並強調超市與供應商的長期協議將有助於穩定價格。
briefing.background: 隨著全球市場對於食品價格的關注加劇，特別是在中東地區的衝突可能影響供應鏈的背景下，英國的食品零售業也面臨挑戰。Sainsbury's作為英國第二大超市，擁有與供應商的長期合約，這在一定程度上能夠緩解價格波動的風險。過去幾年，食品價格因疫情和供應鏈問題而上漲，消費者對未來價格走勢的預期變得更加敏感。
briefing.analysis: Sainsbury's的聲明顯示出其對市場的信心，並試圖安撫消費者的擔憂。然而，市場分析師對於食品價格的未來走勢仍持謹慎態度，特別是在全球商品價格波動的背景下。供應商和零售商之間的長期合約雖然能提供一定的保護，但若原材料成本持續上升，最終可能還是會轉嫁給消費者。這樣的情況可能會導致消費者信心下降，影響整體消費支出。

supporting_titles: Asda boss rejects profiteering claims as petrol price tops 150p

economy.title: US menus change as Trump's tariffs hit wine prices - Reuters
economy.summary: US menus change as Trump's tariffs hit wine prices Reuters

briefing.news_focus: US menus change as Trump's tariffs hit wine prices Reuters
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國因特朗普的關稅政策導致葡萄酒價格上漲，餐廳菜單因此調整，反映出貿易政策對消費市場的直接影響。
briefing.background: 特朗普政府在其任期內實施了一系列關稅政策，特別是針對來自歐洲的商品，包括葡萄酒。這些關稅旨在保護美國本土產業，但同時也引發了價格上漲和消費者行為的變化。餐廳業者因應成本上升，開始調整菜單，選擇更便宜或本地的酒品，以維持利潤和顧客流量。
briefing.analysis: 這一政策改變使得餐廳業者面臨兩難，既要應對成本上升的壓力，也要考慮顧客的接受度。高端餐廳可能會選擇調整酒單以保持品牌形象，而中小型餐廳則可能更傾向於選擇成本較低的替代品。此舉可能導致消費者對於進口葡萄酒的需求下降，進一步影響國際貿易關係，尤其是與歐洲國家的貿易。

theme_of_day: 今日新聞的整體敘事主軸圍繞著地緣政治緊張局勢及其對經濟和科技領域的影響。中東局勢的惡化，尤其是伊朗的軍事行動，對全球供應鏈及美國的外交政策產生深遠影響，這與美國國內的科技競爭和經濟政策密切相關。科技版面中提到的企業動態，尤其是在安全與合作方面的變化，亦反映出在當前不穩定的環境下，企業如何調整策略以應對潛在風險。
